name: Garo

skills.name: Piercing Arrow
skills.description: Deals double damage to shields with Basic Attacks and skills.

skills.name: Enchanted Arrows
skills.description: ;On: Range and Basic Attack interval increase. Basic Attack costs Mana and deals damage over time. ;Off: Gains Movement Speed and restores range and Basic Attack interval toinitial values.Basic Attack hits restore Mana.

skills.name: Silent Arrow
skills.description: Fires an arrow in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies hit while silencing and slowing them. After a brief delay, deals another strike of damage to enemies within range of the same location.

skills.name: Sphere of Purity
skills.description: Damages enemies in range. Gains Attack Speed and Critical Rate when in the magic circle.Use this skill again to grant Critical Rate and Move Speed to teammates in the circle and damage enemies in the circle

faqs.answer: Garo is Tier S Marksman with 52.89% win rate, 1.27% pick rate, and 0.25% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).
